subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Hizar Bayti II (Second Tablet of the Thousand Verses)
subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast devoted thy life to the exaltation of the Word of God! What thou hast written was perused
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وقف حیاته لاعلاء کلمه الله آنچه مرقوم فرموده بودید ملحوظ گردید و بدقت
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @personal instructions, @firmness in the Covenant, @chastisement and requital
